backend.changelog: Manifest schema v2 — sha256 field added per artifact. No functional changes to runtime; parser groundwork for Phase 2 auto-apply.

cadBridge.changelog: Apply Update and Rollback now spawn Setup.bat through cmd.exe instead of directly. ShellExecuteEx with Verb runas on a .bat target was unreliable -- on some Windows configurations the elevation handshake silently failed (no UAC dialog, immediate exit code 1, no install). cmd.exe is a proper elevatable executable so the handshake goes through every time. Bootstrap note: fielded 1.8.20--1.8.25 installs have the buggy spawn pattern and CANNOT auto-apply 1.8.26. Workstations on those versions need one final manual install of 1.8.26 via the gateway download link (https://gateway/api/downloads/CadBridge-Setup.zip) -- from 1.8.26 onwards Apply Update works one-click.
